calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-02-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Elaine Li.

Dept. 505; Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:07 am and concluding at 11:14 am.

Plaintiff First National Bank of Omaha is represented by John Vaknin, Esq.
Defendant Elaine Li is not present.

Plaintiff First National Bank of Omaha submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Declaration of Joseph Guenther
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1 is ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE

Plaintiff makes an oral motion to dismiss doe defendants
The Court GRANTS Plaintiffs oral motion to dismiss doe defendants.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff First National Bank of Omaha and against Defendant Elaine Li as follows:

Damages: $5,568.12
Costs: 352.11
Total Judgment: $5,920.23

Counsel to submit proposed judgment to the Court for review and signature. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2023 Set For Trial On Oct-02-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
